content: Retrieve the latest annual revenue, net income, operating margin, and free cash flow for GOOGL (Alphabet) from its most recent 10-K filing. Provide just the numbers.

args.query: What was the annual revenue, net income, operating income, and free cash flow for Alphabet (GOOGL) in the most recent 10-K filing?

data.details:
[Google API] Failed to parse. Text: " {
  "ticker": "GOOGL",
  "filing_types": ["10-K"],
  "limit": 1
}
```". Error: SyntaxError: Unexpected non-whitespace character after JSON at position 61 (line 1 column 62)

Troubleshooting URL: https://docs.langchain.com/oss/javascript/langchain/errors/OUTPUT_PARSING_FAILURE/
